reviews.review_msg: Final was a little hard, but otherwise great course. No one takes econ electives seriously, but for once I really enjoyed this elective. It really helped me really think critically. Natt is overall a good instructor. I'd highly recommend the course.
Good and helpful teacher, but a tough grader.
Awful professor. Does not give any help as a professor and rather cares about his own needs than the students. Condescending when teaching it

Natt is a very helpful TA. He is willing to help even though I am not in his tutorial session. His note are crystal clear and easy to understand and follow. I used to confuse with Econs but now it seems to be that Econs aren't that hard at all.
Natt is a great TA. He knows his stuff. I didn't use to like econ that much but now it doesn't seem so bad.
